patch.value: CodeFactor/Duplication: remove duplicated code blocks (×20: 2 Critical, 3 Major, 15 Minor)

CodeFactor's duplicate-code detector found **20 clones**.

## Breakdown + lists

- Critical ×2 — https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/main?category=Duplication&groupId=2
- Major ×3 — https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/main?category=Duplication&groupId=1
- Minor ×15 — https://www.codefactor.io/repository/github/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/main?category=Duplication&groupId=4

## Strategy

- Production code: extract the duplicated block into a shared helper/constant/module. (This repo already favors shared dedup helpers — see prior chore pm-1b96.)
- Test code: a large share of duplication lives in the command spec files (`create-command.spec.ts`, `update-command.spec.ts`); factor common arrange/act setup into shared test helpers or fixtures and parametrize repeated cases.
- Tackle Critical + Major first.

## Constraints

Behavior-preserving. New shared helpers must themselves be covered to keep the 100% coverage gate green. Mind the 120-file/dir static cap if adding helper files.

First milestone: the 2 Critical + 3 Major duplication clones are removed by extracting shared helpers/fixtures. Stretch: Minor clones to 0. Extracted helpers are covered; full coverage suite green at 100%; pnpm typecheck + quality gates pass.
